title: {YTP} ~ Chuckle Until the Sus Comes Out
description:
Since a lot of great YTP artists have done Chucklevision, I thought I'd try my hand at it. There have been instances where I've had to rage-quit a game. I never thought I'd ever Rage-quit a video.


Support me: https://elliespectacular.com/support
